title: Overgrown Flowery GUI - Mod Compats
description: An extension of the texture pack Overgrown Flowery GUI by Garden Gals to give support to a few more mods.
body:
![Overgrown Flowery GUI Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fcfe8aeb8e7b594696e51d51229a9e4334d2275.webp)

# Overgrown Flowery GUI - Mod Compats

This is an addon for the [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui) resource pack made by the [Garden Gals](https://modrinth.com/organization/garden-gals). I am in no way affiliated with them, just a fan of the GUI and I wanted it to be compatible with all the mods I play with.

<details>
<summary>Mod Compats</summary>

- Vanilla Minecraft
 > - Added a brewing guide to the GUI for the Brewing Stand.
- [Animal Feeding Trough](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal_feeding_trough)
- [Archeological](https://modrinth.com/mod/archeologicalmod)
- [Bartering Station](https://modrinth.com/mod/bartering-station)
